tuning: E A D G B E
content:

[ch]G5[/ch]      32003x
[ch]D/F#[/ch]    20023x

[ch]C[/ch]       x32010

[Intro]
[ch]G5[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]C(add9)[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Coming out of my cage[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
And I've been doing just fine[/tab]
[tab][ch]C(add9)[/ch]
Gotta gotta be down[/tab]
Because I want it all

[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
It started out with a kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
How did it end up like this[/tab]
[tab][ch]C(add9)[/ch]
It was only a kiss, it was only a kiss[/tab]

[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Now I'm falling asleep[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
And she's calling a cab[/tab]
[tab][ch]C(add9)[/ch]
While he's having a smoke[/tab]
And she's taking a drag

[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Now they're going to bed[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
And my stomach is sick[/tab]
[tab][ch]C(add9)[/ch]
And it's all in my head[/tab]

[tab]                       [ch]Em7[/ch]
But she's touching his chest[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]C(add9)[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I just can't look its killing me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C(add9)[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
But it's just the price I pay[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
Destiny is calling me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Open up my eager eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Cause I'm Mister Brightside[/tab]
